price: der Tag, da ins Horn geblasen wird und ihr in Scharen herkommt
arabic: يَوۡمَ يُنفَخُ فِي ٱلصُّورِ فَتَأۡتُونَ أَفۡوَاجٗا

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: yawma yunfakhu fī al-ṣūri fatatūna afwājan
